# presentTemplate(_:animated:)

**Instance Method**

Presents a template modally.

## Declaration

```swift
@MainActor func presentTemplate(_ templateToPresent: CPTemplate, animated: Bool)
```

## Parameters

- **templateToPresent**: A template to display over currently displayed content on the CarPlay screen. The template must be one of the following types:

- [doc://com.apple.carplay/documentation/CarPlay/CPActionSheetTemplate]
- [doc://com.apple.carplay/documentation/CarPlay/CPAlertTemplate]
- [doc://com.apple.carplay/documentation/CarPlay/CPVoiceControlTemplate]
- **animated**: A Boolean value that indicates whether the system animates the display of transitioning templates. Set to [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/true] to animate the transition.

## Discussion

You can present only one template at a time.

## Deprecated Methods

- **setRootTemplate(_:animated:)**: Sets the root template, starting a new stack for the template navigation hierarchy.
- **pushTemplate(_:animated:)**: Pushes a template onto the navigation stack and updates the CarPlay display.
- **popTemplate(animated:)**: Pops the top template from the navigation stack and updates the CarPlay display.
- **popToRootTemplate(animated:)**: Pops all templates on the stack—except the root template—and updates the CarPlay display.
- **pop(to:animated:)**: Pops templates until the specified template is at the top of the navigation stack.
- **dismissTemplate(animated:)**: Dismisses the template that the interface controller is displaying modally.
